text.title: viral-metrics Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for viral-metrics as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Over-incentivizing referrals (50%+ reward to hit K=1).
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Attracts fraud and low-quality users who joined for the reward. Sets unsustainable cost expectations. K plateaus quickly; agents optimizing reward size erode margin without meaningful K lift.

failure-mode.description: Using a single invite channel (email only).
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Users have strong channel preferences. Email-only sharing misses SMS and social invites that convert at 25% vs email's 12-15% in many consumer apps.

failure-mode.description: Sending generic invite blasts from the product (outbreak/spam virality).
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Modern email filters and OS protections block automated contact imports. Damages brand NPS and can trigger CAN-SPAM violations.
